# TiMOS-B-26.3.R1 both/x86_64 Nokia 7750 SR-1
# Configuration format version 26.3 revision 0
configure {
    policy-options {
        prefix-list "system-pfx" {
            prefix 1.1.1.1/32 type exact {
            }
        }
        policy-statement "export-system" {
            entry 10 {
                from {
                    prefix-list ["system-pfx"]
                }
                action {
                    action-type accept
                }
            }
        }
    }
    router "Base" {
        autonomous-system 65001
        interface "system" {
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 1.1.1.1
                    prefix-length 32
                }
            }
        }
        interface "to-r3" {
            port 1/1/c2/1
            ipv4 {
                primary {
                    address 10.0.1.0
                    prefix-length 31
                }
            }
        }
        bgp {
            router-id 1.1.1.1
            group "ibgp" {
                type internal
                peer-as 65001
                export {
                    policy ["export-system"]
                }
            }
            neighbor "10.0.1.1" {
                group "ibgp"
            }
        }
    }
}
